creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 228015
Screenshot of section 5.1 of a PDF of the Handbook

(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)

> <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#x11-synopsis> 
> refers to 
>    <https://www.nomad.org/>

Incidentally, the incorrect URL above is _not_ in 
/usr/local/share/doc/freebsd/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/book.pdf
in version 20210125,1 of misc/freebsd-doc-en
